classes.reasoning: This is a case report form for a single patient visit (Patient BRC471-DE01-001 at Site DE-01) documenting vital signs, ECOG performance status, tumour assessment per RECIST v1.1, study drug dispensing, and adverse events. The document explicitly identifies itself as 'eCRF' and includes data entry and verification signatures from M.Weber and Dr. H. Schmidt.

summary: This is an electronic case report form (eCRF) capturing data from a Cycle 5 Day 1 tumour assessment visit on 03 December 2023 for patient BRC471-DE01-001. The form documents vital signs, ECOG performance status, CT-based tumour assessment showing confirmed partial response (PR) per RECIST v1.1 with 50% reduction in target lesions, study drug dispensing (200mg BID tablets), and ongoing Grade 1 adverse events.
content:
eCRF -- CYCLE 5 DAY 1 / TUMOUR ASSESSMENT VISIT
Study: BIORCE-ONC-2023-001 | Form v2.1 | Site: DE-01 | Patient: BRC471-DE01-001
Visit date: 03 December 2023 | Entered: M.Weber | Verified: Dr. H. Schmidt

VITAL SIGNS
  BP: 124/78 mmHg | HR: 72 bpm | SpO2: 97% | Weight: 76.4 kg

ECOG PS: [X] 0 -- Fully active

TUMOUR ASSESSMENT (CT Chest/Abdomen/Pelvis -- performed 01 Dec 2023)
  Radiologist report date: 02 December 2023

  Site assessment (per RECIST v1.1):
    Target lesion 1 (RUL, 28mm baseline): 14mm -- DECREASE
    Target lesion 2 (mediastinal node, 22mm baseline): 11mm -- DECREASE
    Target lesion 3 (LLL, 18mm baseline): 9mm -- DECREASE
    Sum of diameters: 34mm (baseline: 68mm) -- change: -50.0%
    New lesions: NONE
    Non-target lesions: STABLE

  Site assessment: PARTIAL RESPONSE (PR)
  [Confirmatory scan scheduled C7D1, 29 Jan 2024]
  CONFIRMED PR: [X] Yes
  Date of first PR: 07 October 2023 | Confirmation: 03 December 2023

STUDY DRUG DISPENSING
  Kit: KIT-471-DE01-012 | Tablets: 56 x 100mg | Dose: 200mg BID
  Ondansetron: Yes

ADVERSE EVENTS (since last visit -- none new)
  Ongoing: Acneiform rash Grade 1 (stable, topical Rx ongoing)

Investigator: Dr. H. Schmidt   Sig: [SIGNED]   Date: 03/12/2023
